title: 1kg Club Lump Hammer, Fibreglass Handle, Heavy Duty Steel Head with Rubber Grip, Includes Work Gloves
features: COMPLETE SET: Professional-grade 2lb lump hammer bundled with protective work gloves for immediate use in DIY and automotive tasks
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Solid steel 1kg head with shock-absorbing fibreglass shaft provides excellent striking power and control
ERGONOMIC DESIGN: 26cm length with rubber grip handle ensures comfortable use and reduces hand fatigue during extended work
PRECISE DIMENSIONS: Head measures 9.1cm x 4cm, providing excellent balance and accuracy for controlled strikes
VERSATILE TOOL: Ideal for various tasks including demolition, masonry work, automotive repairs, and general construction projects
description: Tackle your toughest DIY projects with confidence using this SATARGO 1kg club lump hammer. The solid steel head delivers powerful, precise strikes while the lightweight fibreglass handle effectively absorbs shock to reduce user fatigue. Measuring 26cm in length with a 9.1cm head, this well-balanced hammer features an ergonomic rubber grip for secure handling and enhanced control. The durable construction makes it ideal for various tasks from general demolition to automotive repairs. As an added bonus, this set includes a pair of protective work gloves with red nylon backing and black grip coating to keep your hands safe and maintain optimal tool control. The hammer's yellow and black design provides high visibility in your workspace. The compact yet mighty 1kg head weight strikes the perfect balance between power and manageability for both professional and home use applications.
